國際清算第一彈
I noticed on social media that a Hong Kong police and his wife have both acquired British National (Overseas) passport. I believe that they cause a serious threat to the national security of the UK.

The Hong Kong police is notorious for executing the national security law in Hong Kong, as well as oppressing Hongkongers during incidents meticulously documented by the international media. The Hong Kong police not only undermines freedom in Hong Kong, but also conducts human rights abuses and helps the CCP conduct oppression breaching the Sino-British Joint Declaration. The couple may conduct espionage and propaganda activities detrimental to the national security of the UK.

Below are the social media links which I found:


https://twitter.com/Samhon852/status/1278351828388700160?s=20

https://lihkg.com/thread/2090313/page/1

https://www.facebook.com/lihkgpig/posts/287216626025204

I hope that this couple will be arrested upon arrival to the UK, and the information can be shared to other intelligence agencies among the Five Eyes international alliance. This is a great step to stop the Chinese Communist Party from extending its spy network through these pro-CCP anti-democracy immigrants. Thanks a lot for your attention!
